rulings.Case Title: LILLIAN FOREMAN et al VS. CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE & REALTY, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, November 12, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE & REALTY, INC., DAVID CHOO, CRAIG RAYMOND Amended Notice of Hearing on Petition to Compel Arbitration. Petition to compel arbitration denied. No showing plaintiff agreed to arbitration. On August 15, 2006 Plaintiff's attorney in fact signed a subscription agreement that references an offering circular dated January 9, 2006. The offering circular is dated January 4, 2008. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN S. KARLS VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To The First Amended Complaint For Failure To State A Claim Re: The Conversion Of An Idea [Redacted]
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, November 12, 2009, line 6, DEFENDANTS BNY MELLON PERFORMANCE & RISK ANALYTICS, INC., THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON Demurrer to the First Amended Complaint for Failure to State a Claim Re: The Conversion Of An Idea. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff has not alleged facts showing the claim is not preempted by state and federal intellectual property law or that the property converted was tangible property. No reasonable probability that defect can be cured by amendment. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN S. KARLS VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK et al

rulings.Case Title: IL FORNAIO AMERICA CORPORATION A DELAWARE VS. FERRADO GARDENT COURT, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue Based On "Wrong Court" And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, November 12, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANT FERRADO GARDENT COURT, LLC Motion to Transfer Venue Based on "Wrong Court" and Request for Sanctions. Motion to transfer denied. San Francisco proper venue where contract was entered in this county. CCP section 395(a). The Complaint is for declaratory relief related to the lease and is not a "local" action because no issues involving property rights are at stake. Requests for sanctions denied. =(302/CWW)
